creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to guoqiang_cn from comment #3)

I know :)

The Bugzilla rules require approval from the ports maintainer before a commit is "allowed". See Committers Handbook, rule no. 11:

https://docs.freebsd.org/en_US.ISO8859-1/articles/committers-guide/article.html#rules
